title: Eastern-Style Stuffed Cabbage Rolls
description: A delicious and healthy twist on traditional stuffed cabbage rolls, featuring tender labneh and crunchy savoy cabbage.
instructions: 1. Blanch the cabbage leaves in boiling water for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the labneh, onion, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
3. Lay a cabbage leaf flat and place a tablespoon of the labneh mixture in the center.
4. Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll into a tight cylinder.
5. Repeat with the remaining cabbage leaves and filling.
6. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
7. Add the stuffed cabbage rolls seam-side down and cook for 5 minutes.
8. Flip the rolls and cook for an additional 5 minutes, until lightly browned.
9. Serve hot with your favorite Eastern-style sides.
